title: Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary is a 0.45-square-kilometre (0.17 sq mi) protected area in Tiruvarur District, Tamil Nadu, India, at 10°26′59″N 79°27′58″E.
overview.description: Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary is a 0.45-square-kilometre (0.17 sq mi) protected area in Tiruvarur District, Tamil Nadu, India, at 10°26′59″N 79°27′58″E. In 1999, this sanctuary was declared as a protected area. It has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2022.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nachikulam
topPlaces.description: Nachikulam is a village administered by the Udayamarthandapuram Panchayath in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. ECR East Coast Road pass through this village.

topPlaces.name: Kothandaramar Temple, Thillaivilagam
topPlaces.description: Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Rama, the seventh avatar of the god Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple (கற்பகநாதர்குளம் கற்பகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Karpaganatharkulam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Karpaganathar.

topPlaces.name: Sithamalli
topPlaces.description: Sithamalli is a village of Mannargudi Taluk in Tiruvarur district Tamil Nadu, India. Muthupet is a nearby town.

topPlaces.name: Jambuvanodai
topPlaces.description: Jambuvanodai is a village in Muthupettai taluk, Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India, near Muthupet. In 2011, the village had a population of 3,839.

topPlaces.name: Reguramasamudram
topPlaces.description: Reguramasamudram is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Muthupet
topPlaces.description: Muthupet is a panchayat town and taluk in the Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is also known as Pearlpet.

items.note: Nachikulam is a village administered by the Udayamarthandapuram Panchayath in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. ECR East Coast Road pass through this village.

Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Rama, the seventh avatar of the god Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition.

Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple (கற்பகநாதர்குளம் கற்பகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Karpaganatharkulam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Karpaganathar.
Sithamalli is a village of Mannargudi Taluk in Tiruvarur district Tamil Nadu, India. Muthupet is a nearby town.
Jambuvanodai is a village in Muthupettai taluk, Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India, near Muthupet. In 2011, the village had a population of 3,839.
Reguramasamudram is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Muthupet is a panchayat town and taluk in the Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is also known as Pearlpet.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Udayamarthandapuram Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nachikulam, Kothandaramar Temple, Thillaivilagam, Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple, Sithamalli, Jambuvanodai.
